chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1801 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 06.03.2025 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Parkash Kumar, Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan. == The instant petition has been filed seeking direction to respondents No.4 to 7 to open the Bank Account No.PK26NBA0008004104923000, National Bank of Pakistan Dadu Branch. Today learned DAG has filed a statement along-with documents as provided by National Bank main branch Dadu and points out to para-04 of the letter dated 22.01.2025, whereby it has been reported that account in question has been blocked under the order of the Hon’ble High Court in Special Criminal A.T.A No.133 of 2022 dated 02.10.2023. In view of the above, the instant petition is disposed of, however, the petitioner may avail his remedies, in accordance with the law at the appropriate forum, if so advised. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish *
